description_long: This storage locker is a large, rectangular structure composed of two main sections: a taller, brick-textured block and a longer, flat-roofed unit with a dark gray finish. The brick-textured section features vertical slits, likely for ventilation, and a raised platform with steps and a railing, suggesting an entry point. The flat-roofed section has bold white letters 'MA' and an orange door, indicating a designated access area. The surfaces are predominantly matte and hard, with a mix of brick, metal, and concrete materials. The overall design is robust and industrial, suitable for secure storage in urban environments. The structure appears fixed and immovable, with no visible wheels or portable features.
description: A large, industrial-style storage locker with a brick-textured section, vertical ventilation slits, and a flat-roofed, dark gray unit marked with 'MA' and an orange door.
description_view_0: Shows the side of the storage locker with the brick-textured section and a small entry platform with steps and railing.
description_view_1: Displays the flat-roofed section with 'MA' lettering and an orange door, as well as the vertical slits on the brick-textured section.
description_view_2: Highlights the rear of the structure, showing the full extent of the brick-textured and flat-roofed sections with minimal detail.
description_view_3: Presents the opposite side of the flat-roofed section, mostly featureless and solid gray.
